rationale: The cited paper appears mainly as a supporting reference in background/method discussion of neurophysiological measures, alongside other citations. It is used to justify general claims (for example, interpreting biometric signals such as parasympathetic tone as related to processing depth), not as a focal prior theory, model, or empirical benchmark that the 2021 paper directly builds on. The citing paper does not develop hypotheses from this specific study, nor does it reuse its market-response framework or position its contribution as an extension/refinement of that paper.
